lines.english: by his grace, the whole world is saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਚਿਤਿ ਆਵੈ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jan kai sang chit aavai naau |
lines.english: in the Company of this humble servant, the Lord's Name comes to mind.
This is his purpose in life;
He Himself is liberated, and He liberates the universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਰਾਧਿਆ ਪੂਰਾ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: pooraa prabh aaraadhiaa pooraa jaa kaa naau |
lines.english: I worship and adore the Perfect Lord God. Perfect is His Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸੁ ਜਨ ਕਉ ਸਦਾ ਨਮਸਕਾਰੁ ॥੮॥੨੩॥
lines.translit: naanak tis jan kau sadaa namasakaar |8|23|
lines.english: O Nanak, to that humble servant, I bow in reverence forever. ||8||23||
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪੂਰਾ ਪਾਇਆ ਪੂਰੇ ਕੇ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak pooraa paaeaa poore ke gun gaau |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, I have obtained the Perfect One; I sing the Glorious Praises of the Perfect Lord. ||1||
Listen to the Teachings of the Perfect Guru;
Ashtapadee:
and the anxiety within your mind shall depart.
see the Supreme Lord God near you.
With each and every breath, meditate in remembrance on the Lord of the Universe,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਕੀ ਧੂਰਿ ਮਨ ਮੰਗ ॥
lines.translit: sant janaa kee dhoor man mang |
lines.english: and pray for the dust of the feet of the Saints.
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, cross over the ocean of fire.
Abandon the waves of fleeting desire,
Renounce your selfishness and conceit and offer your prayers.
Happiness, intuitive peace, poise and bliss
Nanak bows in humility and reverence to the Perfect Guru. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਧਨ ਕੇ ਭਰਿ ਲੇਹੁ ਭੰਡਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: har dhan ke bhar lehu bhanddaar |
lines.english: Fill your stores with the wealth of the Lord.
Drink in the ambrosial essence of the Glorious Praises of the Lord of the Universe.
You shall be spared from hell - save your soul!
in the Company of the Holy, meditate on the Lord of supreme bliss.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕ ਰੂਪ ਜਾ ਕੇ ਰੰਗ ਅਨੇਕ ॥
lines.translit: ek roop jaa ke rang anek |
lines.english: He has One Form, but He has many manifestations.
Focus your consciousness on the One, the All-pervading Lord
Destroyer of sorrow, perfectly Merciful.
Sustainer of the Universe, Lord of the world, Kind to the poor,
The most sublime hymns are the Words of the Holy.
Meditate, meditate in remembrance on the Naam, again and again.
O Nanak, it is the Support of the soul. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਫਲ ਜੀਵਨੁ ਸਫਲੁ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਸੰਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: safal jeevan safal taa kaa sang |
lines.english: His life is prosperous, and his company is fruitful;
He himself swims across, and saves others as well.
One who listens and acts on them is saved.
These are priceless rubies and gems.
Hail, hail to him, for whom the sound current of the Shabad vibrates.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਨਿ ਸੁਨਿ ਅਨਦ ਕਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਗਾਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: sun sun anad kare prabh gaajai |
lines.english: Hearing it again and again, he is in bliss, proclaiming God's Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਮਨਿ ਲਾਗਾ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai man laagaa har rang |
lines.english: his mind is imbued with the love of the Lord.
Nanak is saved in their company. ||3||
Hearing that He can give Sanctuary, I have come seeking His Sanctuary.
The Lord radiates from the foreheads of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਟਿ ਗਏ ਬੈਰ ਭਏ ਸਭ ਰੇਨ ॥
lines.translit: mitt ge bair bhe sabh ren |
lines.english: Hatred is gone, and I have become the dust of all.
I have received the Ambrosial Naam in the Company of the Holy.
Bestowing His Mercy, God has blended me with Himself.
I have been released from worldly entanglements and corruption,
hearing the Lord's Name and chanting it with my tongue.
The Divine Guru is perfectly pleased;
the service of His servant has been rewarded.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਉਸਤਤਿ ਕਰਹੁ ਸੰਤ ਮੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: prabh kee usatat karahu sant meet |
lines.english: Sing the Praises of God, O Saints, O friends,
By His Grace, God has bestowed His Mercy.
O Nanak, my merchandise has arrived save and sound. ||4||
with total concentration and one-pointedness of mind.
Sukhmani is the peaceful ease, the Glory of God, the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਮਨਿ ਬਸੈ ਸੁ ਹੋਤ ਨਿਧਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: jis man basai su hot nidhaan |
lines.english: When it abides in the mind, one becomes wealthy.
He obtains the highest place of all.
One becomes the most respected person, famous all over the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਇਛਾ ਤਾ ਕੀ ਪੂਰਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sarab ichhaa taa kee pooran hoe |
lines.english: All desires are fulfilled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਖਾਟਿ ਚਲੈ ਜਨੁ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: har dhan khaatt chalai jan soe |
lines.english: One who departs, after earning the wealth of the Lord's Name,
O Nanak, realizes it. ||5||
He does not come and go in reincarnation any longer.
learning, penance, Yoga and meditation on God;
Comfort, peace and tranquility, wealth and the nine treasures;
wisdom, knowledge, and all spiritual powers;
